title: Tamako Market
sourceNotes: Single season, 12 episodes (excludes the separate 6-episode Blu-ray special set). Original Kyoto Animation anime; the tie-in light novel is a close novelization of the TV series, complete at 11 chapters. The 2014 sequel film Tamako Love Story has its own separate novelization and is not covered by these chapter ranges.

movies.title: Tamako -love story-
movies.note: Canon sequel film continuing directly after the TV series; own separate light novelization, not covered by the TV chapter ranges above.
